summary: Backend: 18/18 pytest tests pass after fixing CheckoutStatusResponse 500 caused by emergentintegrations Stripe metadata-validation bug. Frontend: Home, Pricing, Live Dashboard, Admin all visually working. Critical UI bug: URL ?package= query param does NOT preselect the package in the qualifier Select dropdown, blocking the entire submit flow.

minor.issue: emergentintegrations library raises CheckoutError because Stripe returns metadata as StripeObject (not dict) — pydantic validation fails. Worked around with defensive try/except fallback so polling no longer 500s, but actual Stripe-side payment_status will not be reflected unless the Stripe webhook fires. Real fix likely needs library upgrade or coercion of metadata to dict before passing to CheckoutStatusResponse.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigating to /qualifier?package=amex_power_pack does NOT preselect the package in the Radix Select dropdown — trigger keeps showing 'Choose a tradeline' placeholder. State may be set before packages fetch completes, so Radix Select cannot match value to a SelectItem and the trigger never re-syncs. Result: order summary never renders and submit button stays disabled — user must manually re-select the package.

integration_issues.flow: Pricing card → Qualifier prefill → Submit → Stripe redirect
integration_issues.issue: Broken end-to-end because of the package-preselect bug above. Once the user manually selects the package, the form submits, /api/applications + /api/payments/checkout/session work and the user is redirected to Stripe (verified in code path; backend returns valid Stripe URL).

action_items: FIX HIGH: Make Select trigger sync with URL-derived selected_package_id once packages finish loading. Suggested fix in /app/frontend/src/pages/QualifierPage.jsx: combine the URL param effect with packages availability — e.g. apply the URL param only after `packages.bundles.length || packages.individual.length`, or render Select children before applying value, or use a controlled key to force re-render of the Select once packages load. Alternative: keep current behavior but also set selected_package_id from URL inside the same useEffect that fetches packages, so value+items mount together.

MEDIUM: Investigate emergentintegrations metadata-dict bug; either upgrade the library, or coerce the Stripe response metadata to dict before constructing CheckoutStatusResponse. The current try/except masks failures but blocks real-time payment confirmation until webhook fires.
critical_code_review_comments: QualifierPage: URL→state effect runs independently of package fetch, causing race with Radix Select rendering — needs ordering fix.

server.py /payments/checkout/status: webhook will normally bail this out, but production should not depend on workaround; surface the underlying library error in logs (already done with logger.warning).
PricingCard component is fine; MOST POPULAR badge renders correctly with glow on Amex Power Pack.
Backend correctly excludes _id everywhere using projection; good.
Server-side price/amount derivation from PACKAGES is correct (verified weekly /13, biweekly /6, monthly /3, straight_deposit full).
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (added defensive try/except in get_checkout_status to prevent 500 from emergentintegrations metadata bug)
test_credentials: None — admin page is open, no auth.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed applications & payment transactions during checkout-amount tests (monthly/biweekly/weekly/straight_deposit). Safe to leave for admin-page verification; clean up via DB if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After the QualifierPage Select-prefill fix lands, retest the full pricing-card → qualifier (URL-prefilled) → submit → Stripe redirect flow. Verify order-summary shows immediately on landing, submit button is enabled once remaining required fields are filled, and submission redirects to a https://checkout.stripe.com URL. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_miso_fix_it.py — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_miso_fix_it.py -v`. The status endpoint fallback logs a warning when Stripe library throws.
rca of the issue: Qualifier prefill bug RCA: useEffect setting selected_package_id from searchParams executes on mount before /api/packages resolves. Radix Select renders trigger with value 'amex_power_pack' but no matching SelectItem yet (children not mounted). Radix falls back to showing the placeholder. When packages finally load and SelectItem mounts, Radix Select does not re-evaluate the displayed label for an already-set value, leaving the trigger stuck on placeholder. The downstream effect is selectedPackage lookup in allPackages succeeds (so summary should render) — yet observed UI showed '1 field remaining' which indicates selected_package_id state was empty at observation time, suggesting either initial render captured empty value or React StrictMode double-invocation reset it. Reproduction: navigate to /qualifier?package=amex_power_pack — Select stays on placeholder, order summary missing. Mitigation: defer applying the URL param until packages are loaded, e.g. `useEffect(() => { if (allPackages.length && pkg) setValues(...) }, [allPackages, searchParams])`.
